# niri ‚Äî keybindings

## niri

### Launch

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Return` | Open a terminal (ghostty ‚Üí zellij) |
| `Mod+Space` | App launcher (wofi drun) |
| `Mod+Alt+Space` | Command palette ‚Äî all workstation actions |
| `Mod+Alt+S` | SlicedLabs mission-control TUI (floating) |
| `Mod+Alt+E` | Open the [ENGINE] repo in a terminal |
| `Mod+Alt+P` | Music cockpit (mpd / rmpc ¬∑ SomaFM radio) |

### Focus

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+H` | Focus column left |
| `Mod+L` | Focus column right |
| `Mod+J` | Focus window down |
| `Mod+K` | Focus window up |
| `Mod+Tab` | Cycle forward (window / column) |
| `Mod+Shift+Tab` | Cycle backward (window / column) |

### Move

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Shift+H` | Move column left |
| `Mod+Shift+L` | Move column right |
| `Mod+Shift+J` | Move window down |
| `Mod+Shift+K` | Move window up |
| `Mod+Shift+V` | Move column ‚Üí media (mnemonic) |

### Window

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Q` | Close focused window |
| `Mod+F` | Fullscreen window |
| `Mod+W` | Toggle floating |

### Layout

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Shift+F` | Maximize column |
| `Mod+R` | Cycle column width (¬º ‚Üí ‚Öì ‚Üí ¬Ω ‚Üí ‚Öî) |
| `Mod+Comma` | Consume window into column |
| `Mod+Period` | Expel window from column |

|---|---|
| `Mod+1` | Workspace: coding |
| `Mod+2` | Workspace: research |

| `Mod+C` | Workspace: research (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+M` | Workspace: monitoring (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+D` | Workspace: coding / Develop (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+B` | Workspace: browser (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+V` | Workspace: media (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+G` | Gaming: focus workspace, or actions menu if already there |

| `Mod+Shift+2` | Move column ‚Üí research |
| `Mod+Shift+3` | Move column ‚Üí engine |

| `Mod+Shift+8` | Move column ‚Üí media |
| `Mod+Shift+9` | Move column ‚Üí desk |

| `Mod+Shift+C` | Move column ‚Üí research (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+Shift+M` | Move column ‚Üí monitoring (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+Shift+D` | Move column ‚Üí coding (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+Shift+B` | Move column ‚Üí browser (mnemonic) |

### Scene

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Ctrl+E` | Stage scene: engine |
| `Mod+Ctrl+D` | Stage scene: coding |
| `Mod+Ctrl+C` | Stage scene: research |
| `Mod+Ctrl+B` | Stage scene: browser |
| `Mod+Ctrl+V` | Stage scene: media (Spotify) |
| `Mod+Ctrl+M` | Stage scene: monitoring |
| `Mod+Ctrl+S` | Stage scene: streaming |
| `Mod+Ctrl+Shift+G` | Stage scene: gaming |

### HUD

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Slash` | Cockpit ‚ò∞ command menu |
| `Mod+Alt+K` | Keybindings console ‚Äî every key, searchable |
| `Mod+Alt+C` | Control Center ‚Äî toggles ¬∑ sliders ¬∑ stats ¬∑ media ¬∑ power |
| `Mod+Alt+I` | HUD inspector: focused workspace context |
| `Mod+Alt+M` | HUD inspector: media / leisure hub |
| `Mod+Alt+N` | HUD inspector: network / VPN / security |
| `Mod+Alt+A` | HUD inspector: AI team / spend |
| `Mod+Alt+T` | HUD inspector: agenda / standup |
| `Mod+Alt+Y` | HUD inspector: system |

### Appearance

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Alt+L` | Toggle dark / light (hot-reloads) |
| `Mod+Shift+W` | Random wallpaper |

### Screenshot

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Print` | Screenshot (region picker) |
| `Shift+Print` | Screenshot whole screen |
| `Mod+Shift+S` | Screenshot (region) ‚Äî ergonomic trigger |

### Session

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Escape` | Lock screen |
| `Mod+Shift+Escape` | Power menu (lock/suspend/logout/reboot/shutdown) |
| `Mod+BackSpace` | Dismiss all notifications |
| `Mod+Shift+Q` | Quit niri (exit session) |
| `Mod+Shift+Slash` | niri's built-in hotkey overlay (legacy; prefer Mod+Alt+K) |

### Audio

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `XF86AudioRaiseVolume` | Volume up |
| `XF86AudioLowerVolume` | Volume down |
| `XF86AudioMute` | Mute output |
| `XF86AudioMicMute` | Mute microphone |

### Gaming

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Shift+G` | Gaming launcher menu (Steam/Lutris/Heroic/Bottles‚Ä¶) |
| `Mod+Ctrl+G` | Toggle GameMode hold |
| `Mod+F12` | Toggle MangoHud overlay (sends F12) |
